_comment: Exact GEN event counts per HT bin of the HT-binned Herwig7-CH3 NanoGEN production (2026-07-02), on EOS /eos/user/a/amandal/herwig_ch3_dy/. These are the sum of Events num_entries over all CH3_ files (canary seeds 2000000-2 excluded). Use for per-HT stitching (weight = z_xs * sigma_frac_HT / N_HT), NOT to overwrite cms_utils.numentries_herwig[era] (that is the INCLUSIVE madgraphMLM-herwig7 sample's per-era total). HT-binned = the fix for the inclusive sample's starved high-pT tail. 2500toInf may tick up slightly (a few stragglers were still running at count time).
